nation: Mohawks of the Bay of Quinte
economic_notes: Band operates Yote ET Wind Inc., Yote LS Solar Inc., 2710556 Ontario Inc., 2704540 Ontario Inc., 2704545 Ontario Inc. as wholly-owned subsidiaries. Yote LS Solar Inc. holds over 50% ownership of Loyalist Solar LP (a GBE). 2704540 and 2704545 Ontario Inc. formed Mohawk Golf Course Limited Partnership (a GBE). ISC provided 51.5% of funding (2021: 50.3%), OFNLP2008 provided 5.7% (2021: 8.5%), Province of Ontario provided 13.4% (2021: 14.4%). Band also has investment in Loyalist Solar LP via modified equity method carrying value of $10,226,053.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2022. The text is encoded in an unusual character substitution cipher but financial figures are legible. The Band consolidates 5 wholly-owned subsidiaries (Yote ET Wind Inc., Yote LS Solar Inc., 2710556 Ontario Inc., 2704540 Ontario Inc., 2704545 Ontario Inc.) on a line-by-line basis. Two GBEs (Loyalist Solar LP and Mohawk Golf Course Limited Partnership) are accounted for using the modified equity method. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $43,677,055 from $18,908,000. Large CWJI one-time funds ($10,370,486 ongoing + one-time) noted in deferred revenue. Auditor location is Belleville, Canada - firm name not fully legible but appears to be a local CPA firm. Annual debt service of $1,310,248 represents repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement. Prior year accumulated surplus restated. The financial statements do not include entities that receive their own funding from ISC directly.
